key.name: lock-on-suspend
key.summary: Automatically lock the screen when the computer suspends

key.name: dim-wallpaper-in-dark-style
key.summary: Dim wallpapers when dark style is active

key.name: hotcorner-topleft
key.summary: Action for the top left corner

key.name: hotcorner-topright
key.summary: Action for the top right corner

key.name: hotcorner-bottomleft
key.summary: Action for the bottom left corner

key.name: hotcorner-bottomright
key.summary: Action for the bottom right corner

key.name: hotcorner-custom-command
key.summary: The command that will be executed for the hot corner action 'custom-command' or multiple
key.description: If you just put a single command, it will be used for every hot corner assigned to 'custom-command'. If you instead use the pattern 'hotcorner-topleft:command;;hotcorner-bottomright:command' the specific commands will be used per hotcorner. Possible identifiers are 'hotcorner-[topleft; topright; bottomleft; bottomright]' followed by a ':' and then the command. ';;' is used as delimiter between command definitions.

key.name: panel-main-menu-action
key.summary: Panel main menu action
key.description: Sets the command to run when the panel-main-menu keybinding is pressed.

key.name: interactive-screenshot-action
key.summary: Interactive screenshot action
key.description: Sets the command to run when the interactive-screenshot keybinding is pressed.

key.name: move-maximized-workspace
key.summary: Automatically move maximized windows to a new workspace

key.name: move-fullscreened-workspace
key.summary: Automatically move fullscreened windows to a new workspace

key.name: enable-hotcorners-in-fullscreen
key.summary: Whether hotcorners should be enabled when fullscreen window is opened

key.name: super-scroll-action
key.summary: What action should be performed on Super + Scroll

key.name: switch-to-workspace-first
key.summary: Shortcut to move to first workspace

key.name: switch-to-workspace-last
key.summary: Shortcut to move to last workspace

key.name: move-to-workspace-first
key.summary: Shortcut to move the current window to first workspace

key.name: move-to-workspace-last
key.summary: Shortcut to move the current window to last workspace

key.name: zoom-in
key.summary: Zoom in

key.name: zoom-out
key.summary: Zoom out

key.name: expose-all-windows
key.summary: Shortcut to open the window overview for all windows

key.name: cycle-workspaces-next
key.summary: Cycle to the next workspace to the right or to back to the first

key.name: cycle-workspaces-previous
key.summary: Cycle to the next workspace to the right or to back to the first

key.name: panel-main-menu
key.summary: Open the applications menu

key.name: screenshot
key.summary: Take a screenshot

key.name: interactive-screenshot
key.summary: Launch the interactive screenshot tool

key.name: window-screenshot
key.summary: Take a screenshot of a window

key.name: area-screenshot
key.summary: Take a screenshot of an area

key.name: screenshot-clip
key.summary: Copy a screenshot to clipboard

key.name: window-screenshot-clip
key.summary: Copy a screenshot of a window to clipboard

key.name: area-screenshot-clip
key.summary: Copy a screenshot of an area to clipboard

key.name: switch-input-source
key.summary: Cycle to next keyboard layout

key.name: switch-input-source-backward
key.summary: Cycle to previous keyboard layout

key.name: toggle-multitasking-view
key.summary: Toggle multitasking view

key.name: pip
key.summary: The shortcut to enable picture-in-picture window
key.description: The shortcut to show the selection area to choose a window.

key.name: bsp-focus-left
key.summary: Focus the BSP tile to the left

key.name: bsp-focus-right
key.summary: Focus the BSP tile to the right

key.name: bsp-focus-up
key.summary: Focus the BSP tile above

key.name: bsp-focus-down
key.summary: Focus the BSP tile below

key.name: bsp-move-left
key.summary: Move the focused BSP tile to the left

key.name: bsp-move-right
key.summary: Move the focused BSP tile to the right

key.name: bsp-move-up
key.summary: Move the focused BSP tile up

key.name: bsp-move-down
key.summary: Move the focused BSP tile down

key.name: bsp-toggle-tiling
key.summary: Toggle BSP tiling globally

key.name: bsp-toggle-workspace-tiling
key.summary: Toggle BSP tiling for the active workspace

key.name: bsp-toggle-floating
key.summary: Toggle the focused window between tiled and floating

key.name: bsp-promote
key.summary: Promote the focused window to the BSP master slot

key.name: bsp-rotate-forward
key.summary: Rotate the BSP group forward

key.name: bsp-rotate-backward
key.summary: Rotate the BSP group backward

key.name: bsp-increase-inner-gap
key.summary: Increase the inner BSP gap

key.name: bsp-decrease-inner-gap
key.summary: Decrease the inner BSP gap

key.name: bsp-increase-outer-gap
key.summary: Increase the outer BSP gap

key.name: bsp-decrease-outer-gap
key.summary: Decrease the outer BSP gap

key.name: enabled
key.summary: Whether BSP tiling is enabled

key.name: scope
key.summary: How BSP tiling enablement is scoped

key.name: workspace-enabled
key.summary: Workspace indices with BSP tiling enabled
key.description: Only used when the scope is set to 'workspace'.

key.name: inner-gap
key.summary: Gap between tiled windows

key.name: outer-gap
key.summary: Gap between tiled windows and the work area edge

key.name: border-width
key.summary: Future border width for tiled windows

key.name: border-color
key.summary: Future border color for tiled windows

key.name: live-reorder-on-drag
key.summary: Whether dragging a tiled window live-reorders the BSP tree

key.name: enable-animations
key.summary: Enable Animations
key.description: DEPRECATED: This key is deprecated and ignored.

key.name: three-finger-pinch
key.summary: Three-finger pinch gesture
key.description: The action that corresponds to performing a pinch gesture with three fingers

key.name: four-finger-pinch
key.summary: Four-finger pinch gesture
key.description: The action that corresponds to performing a pinch gesture with four fingers

key.name: three-finger-swipe-up
key.summary: Three-finger up-swipe gesture
key.description: The action that corresponds to swiping up with three fingers

key.name: four-finger-swipe-up
key.summary: Four-finger up-swipe gesture
key.description: The action that corresponds to swiping up with four fingers

key.name: three-finger-swipe-horizontal
key.summary: Three-finger horizontal swipe gesture
key.description: The action that corresponds to performing a horizontal swipe gesture with three fingers

key.name: four-finger-swipe-horizontal
key.summary: Four-finger horizontal swipe gesture
key.description: The action that corresponds to performing a horizontal swipe gesture with four fingers

key.name: colorblindness-correction-filter
key.summary: Colorblind correction filter.

key.name: colorblindness-correction-filter-strength
key.summary: The strength of colorblindness correction filter.

key.name: enable-monochrome-filter
key.summary: Enable monochrome filter.

key.name: monochrome-filter-strength
key.summary: The strength of monochrome filter.
